notes: EA1.1 Extended: Scalar Collapse Demonstration at scale. 20 seeds x 100,000 = 2,000,000 total random opinions. 5 binning tolerances, 9 scalar targets x 1,000 opinions each. Chi-squared independence tests and ANOVA for variance decomposition. Bootstrap 95% CIs on all aggregate metrics.
